title: Perform physical and mechanical tests
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform physical and mechanical tests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule test requirements

pcs.text: Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/test methods and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/test methods and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation/test methods and equipment.

pcs.text: Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple samples.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret and schedule test requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record sample description, compare with specification and note and report discrepancies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare samples and standards in accordance with physical and mechanical testing requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure traceability of samples from receipt to reporting of results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure traceability of samples from receipt to reporting of results.
